name: pacs-context
description: Bundled, project-aware PRD and TRD context routing for PACS agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Load only the PRD context an agent needs.
interface.longDescription: Discovers the active PACS project and routes product and technical work through focused MCP reads and token-budgeted agent packets.
defaultPrompt: Build a budgeted packet for the next PRD item.
Trace these requirements into the TRD.
Review unresolved PRD decisions without loading the full file.
